caption: A man with glasses and a grey beard is featured in a video call or screen-sharing session. He appears in a small inset window in the bottom right of a dark interface, wearing a grey shirt. The main screen displays a complex conceptual map with several circular nodes and connecting lines. Some nodes contain small icons, such as a silhouette of a person and a red figure. Legible text within the interface includes "Explore" and "Explore" inside blue-outlined shapes. The top of the screen shows several browser tabs with titles like "That & Learning by Systemin...", "Florence, by Systemin...", and "Future of Society by Systemin...". A smaller window in the top right shows a man wearing a dark cap. Throughout the sequence, the man in the inset window remains relatively still, and the layout of the conceptual map and browser tabs remains constant.
